auth.newHere: Ohuru ebe a? Lee otu RuralPay si arụ ọ rụ →
auth.registerAsMerchant: Debanye Aha Dị Ka Onye Ahịa Ọhụrụ
auth.registerAsMerchantSubtitle: Nabata Ịkwụ Ụgwọ Maka Azụmahịa Gị
auth.businessInformationSubtitle: Gwa anyị maka azụmahịa gị iji malite ịnabata ịkwụ ụgwọ
auth.notAMerchant: Abu m onye ahia - wufee nzata a
auth.verifyPhoneSubtitle: Tinye Koodu Nọmba 6 ezigara site na SMS, WhatsApp, na Email
auth.stepPersonalHint: Ana achoo nkowa gi iji meputa akauntu gi. Nke a outa ihe dika nkeji 2.
auth.stepMerchantHint: Nke a na-enyere anyi aka iji hazii terminal ikwu ugwo gi ka ndi ahia nwee ike ikwu gi ugwo.
auth.stepPhoneHint: Ana anyi kwenye na nomba a obu nke gi - na-echekwa akauntu gi.
auth.stepRoadmapTitle: Nke a bu ihe i ga-atukwasiri anya
auth.stepRoadmapSubtitle: Usoro 4 ngwa ngwa — ihe dika nkeji 3 n'ozuzu
auth.stepRoadmapSubtitleMerchant: Usoro 5 ngwa ngwa — ihe dika nkeji 4 n'ozuzu
auth.bvnHelp: BVN gi bu nomba 11 jikotar akauntu ulo aku gi niile. Kpoo *565*0# na olu bula netwok iji nweta ya n'efu.
auth.livenessSubtitle: Ana anyi choo iji kwenye na obu gi
auth.livenessWhyHint: Nke a na-ekwenye na obu mmadu n'ezie ma jikoo ihu gi na ndeko BVN gi. Outa ihe dika sekond 10.
auth.livenessStep2: Tugharii isi gi nwayoo mgbe a di gi n'aka
auth.livenessStep3: Ejikool ihu gi na BVN gi - emechara
auth.livenessPrivacyNote: Ana aru oru nlele ihu gi n'uzo nchekwa ma a na-echekwaghị ya n'ngwaoru a.
auth.merchantRegistrationSuccess: Ndebanye Aha Onye Ahịa Gara Nke Ọma
auth.otpValidationFailed: Ọ Dịghị Ike Iji Kwenye OTP
auth.resendFailed: Ọ Dịghị Ike Izipụta Koodu Ọzọ. Biko Nwaa Ọzọ.
auth.registrationFailed: Ndebanye Aha Dara Ada. Biko Nwaa Ọzọ

transactions.transferMoneyDescription: Bufee Ego Na Akaụntụ Ndị Ọzọ

bankTransfer.title: Mbufe Ego Ụlọ Akụ
bankTransfer.saveAsBeneficiary: Chekwaa Dị Ka Onye Ọ Bụ Maka Ya
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailed: Biko Kwenye Nkọwa Akaụntụ. Ịchọ Aha Dara Ada.
bankTransfer.accountVerifyFailedTransfer: Nkwenye Akaụntụ Dara Ada. Enweghị Ike Ịgaa N'ihu Na Mbufe.

onboarding.slide1Subtitle: Kụọ kaadị gị n'elu ọ bụla terminal nke RuralPay wee kwụọ ụgwọ n'ime sekọnd 2 — na-arụ ọrụ ọbụna na-enweghị netwọk.
onboarding.slide2Subtitle: Bufee na ọ bụla akaụntụ ụlọ akụ na Naịjirịa ozugbo. Tinye nọmba akaụntụ ma ọ bụ gụọ QR code.
onboarding.slide3Subtitle: Ịkwụ ụgwọ ọ bụla chọọ mkpịsị aka ma ọ bụ ihu gị. Onye ọzọ enweghị ike izipụ ego site n'akaụntụ gị.

linkBankAccount.verificationSubtitle: Iji jiṣọ akaụntụ ụlọ akụ gị n'ụzọ nchekwa, anyị chọọ iji kwenye na ị nwe akaụntụ ahụ.
linkBankAccount.step2: Nke a na-ekwenye na ị nwe akaụntụ ahụ
linkBankAccount.feeNote: Ịkwụ ụgwọ otu oge • Nchekwa • Ozugbo

mostLovedFeature.label: Kedu ihe kacha amasị gị?
mostLovedFeature.placeholder: dị ka. Ịkwụ ụgwọ site na ịpị dị mfe

mostHatedFeature.label: Kedu ihe na-ewe gị iwe?
mostHatedFeature.placeholder: dị ka. Oke ego enwere ike izipu dị ntakịrị

niceHaveFeature.label: Kedu ihe ga-eme ka nke a zuru oke?
niceHaveFeature.placeholder: dị ka. Ọnọdụ gbara ọchịchịrị, ikewa ịkwụ ụgwọ...

generalFeedback.label: Enwere ihe ọzọ dị gị n'obi?
generalFeedback.placeholder: Gwa anyị ihe ị na-eche — anyị na-agụ ya niile
